name: oncall-drop-signups
description: Investigating a sudden drop in cold signups starting ~6:30 PM PT on 2026-04-08. The drop correlates with anti-abuse defenses blocking bot/scraping traffic that had inflated signup numbers. A reactive reg model was previously ramped (incident-11066), reverted, and now existing defenses appear to be catching the same abusive traffic. w/4w comparison suggests signups are inline with normal levels. Need to confirm from the anti-abuse side what changed.
